---
title: "Workshop summary and path forward"
format: qmdrslides-revealjs
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(countdown)
```


## Goals for this workshop


What happens to the instances?  

Discussion of best practices  

What to do next?

## Practicalities

::: r-fit-text
WiFi:

Network: KTB Free Wifi (no password needed)

Network AHRI  
Password: `@hR1W1F1!17`

Network AHRI Internet only  
Password: `AHRI twenty three!`  

Network CAPRISA-Corp Password: `corp@caprisa17`

Bathrooms are out the lobby to your left
:::

{{< include ../_wooclap.qmd >}}
